chunks.title: Wisdom in Daily Life
chunks.reason: A collection of short proverbs contrasting peace with strife and testing hearts.

chunks.title: Character and Speech
chunks.reason: Observations on the behavior of evildoers, liars, and the impact of rebuke.

chunks.title: Rebellion and Friendship
chunks.reason: Warnings about rebellious men contrasted with the enduring nature of friendship.

chunks.title: Wisdom and Folly
chunks.reason: Instructions on pledges, justice, and the grief caused by foolish sons.

chunks.title: Discernment in Silence
chunks.reason: Final proverbs on justice and the wisdom found in silence.
